title: Automate Azure Load Testing by using GitHub
summary: Learn how to implement GitHub Actions and configure Azure Load Testing to automate testing app deployments.

sections.title: Automate Azure Load Testing by using GitHub
sections.summary: Learn how to implement GitHub Actions and configure Azure Load Testing to automate testing app deployments.

lessons.title: Implement GitHub Actions
lessons.content_md:
GitHub Actions is a powerful CI/CD platform that allows developers to automate their software development workflows. Learn how GitHub actions are implemented, how workflow files are structured, and how to control workflow execution.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-github-actions/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Implement GitHub Actions for Azure
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use GitHub Actions for Azure in your workflows and configure Azure with the necessary security principals to automate software development workflows between GitHub and Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-github-actions-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Implement Azure Load Testing
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to optimize application performance by simulating real-world loads with Azure Load Testing service. Learn how to automate load testing with GitHub Actions to ensure consistent application performance and scalability.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-azure-load-testing/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Automate Azure Load Testing by using GitHub
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Automate Azure Load Testing by using GitHub**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
